source_description: Heavily sanitized skeleton of a real scraped novel site (速读谷/sudugu.org), migrated from legacy Reader-Core case_022/{toc,detail,content}.html. Preserves the full DOM structure (header/menu/container/item/itemtxt/des/dir/list/con/prenext/submenu classes) for CSS rule validation while replacing all copyrighted novel text, real cover images, and real domains. Tests detail/toc/content rule extraction against a realistic site skeleton with duplicate-chapter entries (第37章 appears twice) for parity testing.
sanitization: Heavy sanitization applied. Real domain sudugu.org → books.example.test / img.example.test. Real novel 《捞尸人》by 纯洁滴小龙 (562.4万字, copyrighted) → 示例小说 by 示例作者. All ~5600 chars of copyrighted chapter text → 4 synthetic CJK placeholder paragraphs. Real cover image URLs (sudugu.org/files/cover/...) → img.example.test/cover/sample.png. Chapter list truncated from 608 to 10 entries (preserving the duplicate 第37章 pattern). Stripped all <script> tags, external CSS, tracking pixels (tj.js, v7.js), and related-novel sidebar.

privacy_check.notes: All copyrighted novel text replaced with synthetic placeholders. All real domains and image URLs neutralized. DOM structure preserved for rule validation only.
